title: neonauclea gracilis
intro: Neonauclea gracilis, also known as the Gracilis Neonauclea, is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neonauclea gracilis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
